name: Mexical Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce, ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, egg and pepper; mix well.
2. In a 13 x 9-inch baking dish, pat the ground beef firmly into the bottom of the dish.
3. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes; spoon off fat.
4. Prepare the corn muffin mix as per package instructions; stir in chopped chilies.
5. Spread the remaining sauce on top of the beef mixture and sprinkle with cheese.
6. Spread the corn muffin mix over everything and bake for an additional 15 minutes until golden brown.
